description:
Recto: Legal document or state document, probably. In Arabic script. Fragment (upper left piece). Twice mentions Khiḍr b. ʿImrān. Seems to recount some sort of procedure involving the writing of documents/letters. On line five: على ما جرت به العادة. May be describing a mercantile dispute. Needs examination for content. (AP)

Verso: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
